titleStmt.title: SII 28.243: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 243. (A.R. No. 398 of 1913.) Eṟumbūr, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: Kadambavanēśvara temple, central shrine, north wall.

Records the decision of the peruṅguṛi-pperumakkaḷ of Śrī-Vaḷavanmādēvichchaturvvēdimaṅgalam, a brahmadēyam in Meṟkkā-nāḍu in vaḍakarai Rājēndrasiṁha-vaḷanāḍu: (vāriyam) to pay themselves the chilvari in respect of the land of the Gods: 1) Chiṟuttirukkōyil-uḍaiyār, 2) Ten-Tiruvēṅgaḍattāḻvār and 3) Eṟumbūr Tirumērkkōyil-āḻvār and an order to ūr-vāriya-pperumakkal doing samvatsaram from the month Kaṟkkaṭaka in the year cited to pay that chilvari as nimandam for the offerings to the three Gods.
The details of the provision as recorded are of interest as they are indicative of the rate of chilvari assessed.

1) Against 4 mā, 3 kāṇi of land belonging to the first God, one padakku of paddy was ordered to be provided (per day). This one padakku of paddy was meant to provide 4 nāḻi of rice (one kuṟuṇi = 2 nāḻi of) for the main food offering, the balance being meant to provide for the other accompanying dishes including arecanut, during the service to that God once in a day.
2) Against one mā of land belonging to the second God, provision was to be made for only the main food offering with 2 nāḻi of rice in a day.
3) Against one and a half mā belonging to the third God also provision was to be made for only 2 nāḻi of rice for the main food-offerings, again once in a day.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumaṉṉivaḷara Irunilamaṭantai poṟceyap pāvaiyum cirttaṉiccelviyun taṉ perunteviyarāki
Iṉpuṟa neṭunilam Ūḻiyuḷ Iṭaituṟai nāṭum tuṭar vaṉavelippaṭar vaṉavāciyuñ cuḷḷicūḷ matiṭ koḷḷippāk
kaiyum naṇṇaṟ karumuraṇ maṇṇaikkaṭakkamum porukaṭaliḻattaraiyar tamuṭiyum Āṅkavaṉ ṟeviya roṅkeḻil
muṭiyum muṉṉavar pakkaṟ ṟeṉṉavaṉ vaitta cuntaramuṭiyum Intiraṉ Āramun teṇṭirai Īḻamaṇṭala muḻutum
Eṟipaṭaik keraḷaṉ muṟaimaiyiṟ cūṭuṅ kulataṉamākiya palar pukaḻ muṭiyuñ ceṅkatirmālaiyuñ caṅkatir
velaittolperuṅkāvaṟ palpaḻantivum ceruviṟ ciṉavil Irupattoru kāl Araicukaḷai kaṭṭa para
śurāmaṉ mevaruñ cāntimaṟṟivaraṇ karuti Iruttiya cem poṟṟiruttaku muṭiyum payaṅkoṭu paḻimi
kamuyaṅkiyil mutukiṭṭoḷitta cayaciṅkaṉ Aḷapperum pukaḻoṭu piṭiyi liraṭṭapāṭi Eḻarai IlakThe stone containing lines 9-13 missing.
l Uttiralāṭamum veṟimalart tirttat teṟipuṉaṟ kaṅkaiyum Alaikaṭal naṭuvuṭ palakalañ celutti caṅkirāmavicai
yorttuṅkapaṉmanākiya kiṭārattaraiyaṉai vākayam porukaṭaṟ kumpakkariyoṭum Akappaṭutturimaiyiṟ piṟakkiya perune
tippiṟakkamum Ārttavaṉ vaṉakarp porttoḻil vācalil viccātira toraṇamum moyttoḻiṟ puṉamaṇipputavamuṅ ka
ṉmaṇik kutavamum niṟai vijaiyamuttuṟai nirppaṉṉaiyum vaṉmalaiyuraiyiṟṟoṉ malaiyūrum Āḻkaṭallakaḻcūḻ māyiruṭiṅkamuṅ kala
ṅkāval viṉai Ilaṅkācopamuṅ kāppura niṟaipuṉal māp pāḷamuṅ kāvalaṉ puricai mevilipaṅkamum viḷaippantūṟuṭai vaḷaippantūṟuṅ kalaintakkor pukaḻ talaittak
kolamum titamarvalviṉai mātamaliṅkamuṅ kalā r kaṭuntiṟal Ilāmuri tecamuṅ teṉakkalāpoḻil māṉakkavāramun toṭukaṭaṟ kāvaṟk kaṭumuraṭ kaṭāramum māpperun taṇṭāṟkoṇṭa kopparake
caripanmarāṉa śrīrājentradevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 4 Āvatu nāḷ 3 100 4 10 1 ṉāl vaṭakarai rājentrasiṁha vaḷanāṭṭu meṟkkā nāṭṭu brahmateyam śrīvaḷavanmāteviccaturvveti maṅkalattup peruṅ
kuṟip perumakkaḷom Iṟṟai nāḷāl pakal nam brahmastānam Ampalam tiruvaraṅkatevanile peruṅkuṟi kūṭi Iruntu paṇitta Eḻuttu kaṟkkaṭakanāyaṟu mutal samvatsaram ceykiṉṟa
Ūr vāriyap perumakkaḷ kaṇṭu ciṟuttirukkoyil Uṭaiyār nilam nāṉku māvaraikkāṇiyāl cilvari nāme Iṟuttu kuṭukka Itiṉukku nimantamāka cantiracekarapperumāḷukku Oru potu nā
nāḻi tiruvamutukku nellu kuṟuṇi Irunāḻiyum tayiramutukku nellu nāḻiyum santi viḷakkum porikkaṟiyamutukku neyamutukku Āka nellu nānāḻiyum Aṭai
kkāyamutukku nellu nāḻiyum Āka nellu patakku Āka nimantam celuttakkaṭavārkaḷākavum ten tiruveṅkaṭattāḻvār nilam Oru māvukkum nāme cilvari Iṟuttu ku
ṭukka Itinukku nimantamāta nicatam Orupotu Irunāḻi Ariciyāl tiruvamutu cevikka kaṭavārkaḷākavum Eṟumpūr tirumeṟkkoyil Āḻvār nilam Orumāvaraikkum nāme cilavari Iṟuttuk kuṭukka Itiṉukku nimantamāka Oru potu Irunāḻi Ariciyāl tiruvamutu ceyvikka kaṭavārka
ḷākavum Ipparicu nimantamāka ceytu kallil veṭṭuvikkap peṟuvārkaḷāka Ipparicu paṇip paṇiyāl paṇittu niyokam kuṭuttom peruṅkuṟip perumakkaḷom paṇittār śrīrājarājaceri tu muṇṭur Āccamaṇasaha hi rum śrītripuvanamahādeviccerināma can nam
kramavittunum śrīvikramacoḻa tiruvikkirama [ keśuvanu] m [śrī]kaṇṭarātittaceri tūṟpil ya[jña ] vittanum coḻac cirāmakkiramavittanum mumuṭicoḻacceri Damaged and continuation lost A piece possibly unconnected reads.
1. kku teṟkku nālāṅ kaṇṇāṟ[ṟu]
2. vum āka nancai nilam [n]ā • lu mākāṇiyum •••
3. [ṭu]māk[kāṇa]
Digital edition of SII 28.243 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
